headings.usage: Hero Titles, Article H1/H2/H3, Section Headers

mono.usage: Overlines, dates, reading time, tags, ADVERTISEMENT labels

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default (p-4, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32)

grid_system.featured_articles: Bento Grid (md:grid-cols-12 gap-6). Hero article spans 8 cols, others span 4.
grid_system.blog_layout: Grid lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12. Article content spans 8 cols, Sidebar spans 4 cols.

header.style: Glassmorphism: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10
header.elements: Logo (Clash Display), Desktop Nav Links, Search Icon, Mobile Hamburger Menu

hero.style: Left-aligned heavy typography over dark noise texture with subtle neon blue/purple orb glows in background. High emotional impact.
hero.title: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter

article_cards.style: Neumorphic/Glass variant. bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.08] hover:border-white/[0.15] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300
article_cards.hover_effect: Image scales slightly (scale-105), border glows slightly.

category_pills.style: Rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-mono border border-white/10 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

adsense_slots.style: Subtle integration. border border-dashed border-white/20 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.01] flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative p-4
adsense_slots.label: Absolute top-2 left-4 text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-500 tracking-widest uppercase content-['PUBLICIDAD']

reading_progress_bar.style: Fixed top-0 left-0 h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-500 z-[60] origin-left

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]

micro_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have explicit hover states (color change + transition).
micro_interactions.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion to stagger-fade-in article lists (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1).
micro_interactions.smooth_scroll: Implement Lenis library for premium scrolling momentum.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a sleeker, premium feel.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='nav-home-link', data-testid='article-card-1').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config extending the fonts to 'Clash Display' (font-display), 'Satoshi' (font-sans), and 'JetBrains Mono' (font-mono).
2. Add a global noise texture overlay using a base64 repeating SVG or CSS radial gradients to prevent the #05050A background from looking flat.
3. Build the Hero section using the 'hero_bg' image mapped as a blurred/darkened background, with stark, left-aligned typography on top.
4. Implement Shadcn UI where applicable (Forms, Dialogs, Dropdowns for search/filters) but override background to match dark theme.
5. For the Adsense slots, create a dedicated reusable React component <AdSlot /> that accepts dimensions. Render it with a dashed border and 'PUBLICIDAD' label so it looks intentional in the layout.
6. Table of Contents in the blog article sidebar must be sticky. Use IntersectionObserver to highlight the current section.
7. Do NOT use Inter or Roboto. Only the imported fonts in this JSON.
8. Implement a Reading Progress Bar at the top of the article pages.
9. Populate the app with 10 pre-written dummy articles in Spanish focusing on AI, prompts, automation, and making money.
10. Build necessary Legal pages (Privacy, Cookies, About, Contact) and a fixed Cookie Banner at the bottom.
